overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet streets reflecting vibrant neon lights, pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, and towering buildings with holographic advertisements. The footage displays high-quality game engine graphics with ray-traced reflections and atmospheric lighting typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: pedestrian with glowing red umbrella crosses from right to left in front of camera
approaching open intersection, preparing to exit the covered overpass area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the massive overpass toward the intersection, observing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and futuristic traffic

notable_agents.action: person with glowing red umbrella crossing the plaza from right to left
futuristic black sedan driving along the street with neon underglow

large illuminated sign displaying '09' in bright white neon mounted on a red structural column
futuristic traffic signal with glowing green light and yellow housing
tall buildings covered in bright blue and pink holographic advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive industrial overpass in a futuristic city at night. The camera walks forward toward a large illuminated '09' sign while pedestrians with glowing umbrellas cross the wet concrete plaza. Holographic billboards illuminate the right side of the frame as the camera approaches the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with glowing road markings and wet pavement

events.description: futuristic black car with glowing red taillights drives past from right to left
finishing crossing the street and stepping onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet intersection, navigating between futuristic vehicles and observing the vibrant neon reflections on the rain-slicked pavement

notable_agents.action: sleek black futuristic car driving through the intersection with glowing red taillights
person with glowing purple umbrella walking along the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: rain-slicked asphalt road reflecting colorful neon lights in pink, blue, and yellow patterns
yellow grid-patterned crosswalk markings with glowing edges and directional arrows
tall building with reflective dark glass facade and vertical blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered overpass and crosses the wide futuristic intersection. Wet asphalt reflects vibrant neon lights from surrounding buildings while futuristic vehicles drive past. The camera navigates the glowing crosswalk grid patterns before reaching the opposite sidewalk lined with glass office towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees and neon storefronts

events.description: pedestrian with green glowing umbrella passes by closely on the left
passing by parked futuristic vehicles and entering a denser pedestrian area

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing pedestrians with colorful glowing umbrellas and observing storefront displays

notable_agents.action: person carrying a green glowing umbrella walking toward the camera
person with bright pink hair and gray jacket walking away from the camera

entered.detail: row of tall palm trees lining the street with trunks wrapped in blue neon lights
commercial buildings with bright neon signage, holographic displays, and illuminated entryways
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb with glowing accents and sleek designs

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet concrete sidewalk, the camera passes rows of palm trees with neon-wrapped trunks on the right and commercial storefronts with bright neon signage on the left. Pedestrians with glowing umbrellas in green, purple, and red pass by, while futuristic cars are parked along the curb. The glass office tower looms closer on the right as the crowd density increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial pedestrian street with dense crowds and vibrant neon signage

events.description: entering a denser crowd of pedestrians with multiple glowing umbrellas
pedestrian with purple umbrella temporarily blocks the view ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through a denser crowd of pedestrians on the wet sidewalk, passing by various storefronts with vibrant neon signs and illuminated displays

notable_agents.action: person with blue glowing umbrella looking at their phone while walking
person with purple glowing umbrella and dark clothing walking toward the camera

entered.detail: overhanging building awning creating partial cover over the sidewalk with integrated lighting
illuminated yellow tactile paving strip running along the center of the wet sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a denser, more enclosed pedestrian area with a covered awning overhead and a glowing yellow guidance path along the wet sidewalk. The crowd thickens with numerous pedestrians carrying colorful glowing umbrellas in blue, purple, and yellow. Storefronts with bright neon signs line the left side, and the atmosphere becomes more bustling and urban as the camera continues forward through the crowd.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cavernous industrial overpass into a densely packed, neon-lit pedestrian thoroughfare. It begins by moving toward a large illuminated 09 sign under a massive concrete structure, where holographic billboards cast a glow over pedestrians with shimmering umbrellas. As the camera exits the overpass, the scene opens into a wide intersection of wet asphalt that reflects vibrant neon lights and the movement of futuristic vehicles crossing a glowing grid. The path then shifts toward a sidewalk lined with neon-wrapped palm trees and glass office towers, passing a stream of colorful umbrellas and parked cars. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera enters a bustling pedestrian zone under a covered awning, following a glowing yellow guidance path through an increasingly thick crowd of city dwellers.
